name: Island Vintage Shave Ice
tagline: Organic syrups and fresh fruit toppings in the heart of Waikiki — gourmet done right.
mustOrder: Aloha — organic guava, passion fruit, and coconut cream
North Shore — pineapple with fresh mango chunks on top
add mochi balls and condensed milk drizzle
parking: Royal Hawaiian Center parking garage — validate at the shop
talkStory: Part of the Island Vintage Coffee family, which started in 1996 on the Big Island sourcing Kona coffee direct from farms. Their shave ice operation uses organic, Hawaiian-grown fruit syrups -- not the artificial neon stuff most shops use. The syrups are made in-house from fruits like Kahuku lilikoi and Hamakua strawberries. It's pricier than a roadside stand, but the quality of ingredients justifies the Waikiki premium. Connected to their acai bowl counter, so everything stays fresh.
